libraryDescription:
The data.List library provides a list-type data structure.

This module provides the generic struct List,which stores list data,and generic functions such as add and removefor adding and removing data from it.

Note that arrays cannot be handled as elements in data.List.If you want to use arrays as elements, usedata.WrappedList.

struct0.name: List<Type>
struct0.description: The list struct. It stores list data.

function0.name: clear<Type>
function0.parameters: (List<Type> type) list : The target list struct.

function1.name: size<Type>
function1.description: Returns the size currently in use.
function1.parameters: (List<Type> type) list : The target list struct.

function2.name: add<Type>
function2.description: Adds an element to the end of the list.
function2.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(Type type) value : The element to be added.

function3.name: get<Type>
function3.description: Obtains the element at the specified index.
function3.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(int type) index : The index of the element to be obtained.
function3.returnValue: (Type type) The element at the specified index.

function4.name: set<Type>
function4.declaration: void set<Type>( List<Type> &list, int index, Type element )
function4.description: Assigns an element to the specified index.The element that was at that index is overwritten.
function4.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(int type) index : The index of the element to be assigned. 
(Type type) element : The element to be assigned.

function5.name: insert<Type>
function5.declaration: Type insert<Type>( List<Type> &list, int index, Type value )
function5.description: Inserts an element at the specified index.The element that was at that index moves to the next index.All elements after that also shift one position backward.
function5.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(int type) index : The index at which the element is to be inserted. 
element : The element to be inserted.

function6.name: contains<Type>
function6.description: Determines whether the list contains the specified element.
function6.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(Type type) element : The element whose presence is to be checked.

function7.name: removeAt<Type>
function7.description: Removes the element at the specified index.
function7.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(int type) index : The index of the element to be removed.

function8.name: remove<Type>
function8.description: Removes the specified element.If multiple such elements exist, only the first one is removed.
function8.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(Type type) element : The element to be removed.

function9.name: removeAll<Type>
function9.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(Type type) element : The element to be removed.

function10.name: indexOf<Type>
function10.description: Searches for the specified element from the beginning toward the end.If it exists, its index is returned.If it does not exist, -1 is returned.
function10.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(Type type) element : The element to be searched for.

function11.name: indexOf<Type>
function11.declaration: int indexOf<Type>( List<Type> &list, Type element, int from )
function11.description: Searches for the specified element from the specified index toward the end.If it exists, its index is returned.If it does not exist, -1 is returned.
function11.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(Type type) element : The element to be searched for. 
(int type) from : The search starting index.

function12.name: lastIndexOf<Type>
function12.description: Searches for the specified element from the end toward the beginning.If it exists, its index is returned.If it does not exist, -1 is returned.
function12.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(Type type) element : The element to be searched for.

function13.name: lastIndexOf<Type>
function13.declaration: int lastIndexOf<Type>( List<Type> &list, Type element, int from )
function13.description: Searches for the specified element backward starting from the specified index.If it exists, its index is returned.If it does not exist, -1 is returned.
function13.parameters:
(List<Type> type) list : The target list struct. 
(Type type) element : The element to be searched for. 
(int type) from : The search starting index.

function14.name: reverse<Type>
function14.description: Reverses the order of all elements held by the list.
function14.parameters: (List<Type> type) list : The target list struct.

function15.name: toArray<Type>
function15.description: Stores all elements held by the list into a one-dimensional array and returns it.
function15.parameters: (List<Type> type) list : The target list struct.
function15.returnValue: (Type[] type) A one-dimensional array containing all elements of the list.
